description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that triggers on push to tags matching v* and branch master, and on pull requests to branch master. The workflow has three jobs: build-linux, build-windows, and build-appimage. The build-linux job runs on ubuntu-22.04 with GCC and Clang compilers, installs dependencies, and builds the project. The build-windows job runs on windows-latest with MinGW, installs dependencies, and builds the project. The build-appimage job runs on ubuntu-22.04, installs Qt and dependencies, and builds an AppImage.
